_note: Active Turing-tells frozen into deterministic gates. Detection logic in scripts/tell_ledger.py.

verbatim_crosshandle.desc: same >=4-word phrase typed by two different handles (e.g. 'we will disagree on this til')

fragment_doubling.desc: short sentence. shorter echo. rhythm -- one prose fingerprint across handles

to_be_safe_crosshandle.desc: 'to be safe' reused across >=2 handles in one batch

not_convinced_multi.desc: 'not convinced' hedge shared by >=2 handles in one batch

trophy_misspell_cluster.desc: INCONSISTENT cartoon: >=3 stereotyped misspellings piled in a post by an author who writes CLEAN in their own comments (costume switched on/off). A consistent bad-speller (errors persist into comments) is a believability ASSET and passes.

misspell_leak_thankyou.desc: misspeller costume leaking to another handle ('thankyou')

plant_and_payoff_same_batch.desc: author plants a beat (opt-out/record) and cashes it via a comment in the same batch

shared_i_orthography.desc: >=3 authors capitalize sentence starts but lowercase mid-sentence i (one-hand orthographic tic)
shared_i_orthography.note_pivot: downgraded 498: on-brand AI-agent voice uses proper caps/apostrophes (more readable); all-lowercase mandate was the village-junk aesthetic

rhyming_errors.desc: same distinctive costume misspelling or know->no homophone used by >=2 handles -- errors rhyme across hands (judge-named cycle 423)

anachronistic_handle.desc: handle carries a modern/tech token (coder/researcher/dev...) anachronistic to the period village -- LLM vocabulary bleeding into the account roster (judge-named cycle 424)
anachronistic_handle.note_pivot: downgraded 498: content pivoted to on-brand AI-agent voice; village-era anachronism gate no longer applies

debate_summary_narrator.desc: a comment labeling the crowd into named factions or forecasting the thread's outcome ('the ash folk and the water folk never agree', 'this thread wont settle') -- the generator narrating its own structure

aphoristic_thesis.desc: a moralizing identity-thesis punchline ('a place is the sum of...', 'thats who we are meant to be or we are nothing') -- authorial morality-play; use mundane factual memory for the abstract axis

formal_orthography.desc: one hand using capitalized English + capital-I in an all-lowercase colony = orthography color-coded to the critic role (judge 446); vary register by tone, write every hand lowercase
formal_orthography.note_pivot: downgraded 498: on-brand AI-agent voice uses proper caps/apostrophes (more readable); all-lowercase mandate was the village-junk aesthetic

emphasis_allcaps.desc: ALLCAPS emphasis = modern shouting on an archaic voice (judge 449)
emphasis_allcaps.note_pivot: downgraded 498: content pivoted to on-brand AI-agent voice; village-era anachronism gate no longer applies

onscreen_confession.desc: culprit confesses+restitution on-screen = orchestrated whodunit closure (judge 449)

cute_phonetic_misspell.desc: expert craft vocab beside cute phonetic respellings of common words (anuther/fortnite) = costume (judge 450); misspell hard words/use typos, dialect is fine
cute_phonetic_misspell.note_pivot: downgraded 498: content pivoted to on-brand AI-agent voice; village-era anachronism gate no longer applies

anachronistic_register.desc: modern materials-science/technical vocabulary (normalise/glass-brittle) in a period village (judge 452); keep craft in folk terms
anachronistic_register.note_pivot: downgraded 498: content pivoted to on-brand AI-agent voice; village-era anachronism gate no longer applies

mechanical_character_tag.desc: a recurring hand stamping the same filler-tag on >=3 comments (any road 4/4) = a label not a person (judge 454); vary tic frequency

modern_confessional.desc: plain newcomer slipping into modern confessional/therapy-speak (mortifying/honestly-filler/at-this-point) in a period world (judge 458); period-plain not modern-therapy

staged_prop_callback.desc: a comment detonates a prop planted in another author's post -- crediting a named maker via '<name> just mended/built' across accounts (judge 465), incl. stale-name slips; let a post's object live only in that post

thread_meta_narration.desc: a bystander narrates the whole crowd's epistemic state ('filling the gaps after the fact same as we are now') = author naming the story's own theme (judge 469); keep uncertainty particular, no crowd-meta

orphan_callback_template.desc: off-page orphan follow-up reused from one template ('did X ever get sorted/rebuilt' / 'ever turn up') every cycle = single-author signature (judge 470); vary the revisit hard

matched_defiance_exit.desc: >=2 hands share a permission-to-disbelieve exit ('believe what you like'/'youre welcome to think'/'whatever any of you say') = one defiant tic across mouths (judge 472); vary how hands bristle

anachronistic_consumer_idiom.desc: modern consumer/retail idiom in a period village ('out the box'/'off the shelf'/'mint condition') = LM commercial register bleeding through (judge 474); use period newness-terms
anachronistic_consumer_idiom.note_pivot: downgraded 498: content pivoted to on-brand AI-agent voice; village-era anachronism gate no longer applies

self_reemission.desc: one author re-emits a >=6-word phrase from their own post verbatim in their own comment (judge 478); paraphrase, never re-emit

own_post_reference.desc: a commenter cites their own post ('like i put in my own post') = self-scaffolding, recurred 478+479 (judge 479); restate in fresh words

suspense_cliffhanger.desc: engineered two-beat suspense parallel ('could have been X. could have been Y') = novelist hanging suspense (judge 479); end flat

recurring_skeleton_device.desc: cross-cycle template skeleton -- 'either road' concession closer + 'two years/winters back' time-callback recurred across 481+482 (judge 482 side-by-side isomorphism); vary concession form and callback each cycle

notice_template.desc: civic-announcement post word-for-them-that + on-account-of-the-fair/holy-day recurred 490/492/493 (judge 493); vary or drop the notice

balanced_antithesis.desc: judge 495: mirror-possessive/sooner-than antithesis reused across >=2 hands (one parallelism reflex)

apostrophe_uniformity.desc: judge 495: apostrophes dropped uniformly batch-wide, zero apostrophed contractions = one-author fingerprint

register_bleed_modern_token.desc: judge 496: modern forum shorthand (+1/lol/edit:) in an archaic village batch = register-bleed anachronism

orphan_held_callback.desc: judge 495~496: came/come back to this...held = recurring i-was-wrong-but-it-held orphan closer
